info.title: slot-booking-system queue REST API
info.summary: Customer takes a number, staff calls the next in line. Anonymous handle (nameKana + phoneLast4) for self-service mutations; the staff token gates the operate-queue surface.

post.summary: Issue a new ticket (walk-in or reservation, ADR-0066/0068)

200.description: Idempotent merge envelope (ADR-0069); existing ticket returned with `merged: true`

get.summary: Slot grid availability for the customer's booking picker (ADR-0066/0068)

200.description: Bucket grid with capacity / taken / available

get.summary: Customer recovery — look up the active ticket by handle (ADR-0069)

post.summary: Cancel a ticket (customer with handle, or staff)
Register a Web Push subscription for the ticket
post.description: ADR-0073 / ADR-0074. The customer registers a browser-side PushSubscription so the alarm sweep can deliver Overdue nudges to a closed tab. Customer-authenticated via `(nameKana, phoneLast4)` (cancel-pattern parity). The endpoint host is gated to the known push services (FCM / Mozilla / Apple).

delete.description: ADR-0073 / ADR-0074. Customer-initiated unsubscribe (e.g. on permission revoke or device cleanup). Idempotent; missing row still returns 200. Authenticated via query string (DELETE bodies are non-portable across user-agents).

post.summary: Reschedule a reservation ticket (atomic appointmentAt swap)
post.description: ADR-0070. Same ticketId / seq / displaySeq / handle / lane stay; only `appointmentAt` is replaced. Customer path verifies the handle constant-time against the stored ticket; staff path uses the `x-staff-token` header. Same-slot submissions return 200 with the unchanged ticket (no-op success).

post.summary: Staff: mark Called or Overdue → Served
Staff: mark Called or Overdue → NoShow
Staff: recall (Called or Overdue → Waiting, original seq preserved)

get.summary: Anonymous shop projection — PII-free, seq/lane/displaySeq only (ADR-0084)
get.description: ADR-0084 split — this endpoint returns the anonymous projection regardless of any auth header. Staff dashboards call `/queue/staff` for the full-ticket payload.

get.summary: Staff shop projection — full Ticket rows + `terminal` history (ADR-0084)
get.description: ADR-0084 split — staff dashboards call this endpoint instead of `/queue` so the response shape is statically known. Requires `x-staff-token`, `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>`, or the `__Host-staff_session` cookie.

post.summary: Staff: call the next Waiting ticket

get.summary: DO Hibernating WebSocket projection feed — server-push on every dispatch.
get.description: Upgrade with `Connection: Upgrade` + `Upgrade: websocket`. The DO emits the anonymous projection (waitingCount, calling, overdue, waitingPreview) on every successful queue mutation. The current snapshot is sent immediately on connect.

post.summary: Exchange the staff secret for a JWT + cookie session
post.description: Accepts `{ password }`. On success returns `{ ok: true, token, expiresIn }` and sets the `__Host-staff_session` cookie. The Bearer token + the cookie are both honoured by requireStaff; clients pick whichever fits their transport.
